title: Confirm Reset Keys
description: Makes sure you don't accidentally reset your keys!
body:
# Confirm Reset Keys

Confirm Reset Keys is a simple mod that simply adds a confirmation screen to make sure you want to reset your keys!

![Confirmation screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/984a277ec563f18e2c513d8686b6b75548b97b78_0.webp)
